item.title: The existential AI threat is here — and some AI leaders are fleeing
item.description: Top AI experts at OpenAI, Anthropic and other companies warn of rising dangers of their technology, with some quitting in protest or going public with...

item.title: Greenhouse gas emissions will keep falling despite Trump's climate rollback
item.description: President Trump is trying to pull the rug out from under federal climate regulation. But the U.S. economy may no longer be standing on it. Why it matt...

item.title: A year into Trump's term, voters say Biden was better
item.description: President Trump has become so politically toxic that voters now say Joe Biden — whose unpopularity forced him into early retirement — did a better job...

item.title: Scoop: Democrats are eyeing protests at Trump's State of the Union address

item.title: Untranslatable words for love from around the world
item.description: Across the globe, many cultures have words for love and attachment that don't have a direct English equivalent. Why it matters: As Valentine's Day app...
